waterfall.step: (i) first, to pay Corporation and trade tax - $12,861,744.99
(ii) second, to pay any Senior Costs and the Finance Vehicle Agent Fee $36,986.50 $12,824,758.49
(iii) third, the Financing Vehicle Profit Amount $83.33 $12,824,675.16
(iv) fourth, to pay the Hedge Counterparty (other than any Hedge Subordinated Amount) $356,200.00 $12,468,475.16
(v) fifth, to pay pro rata and pari passu according to the respective amounts thereof: - $12,468,475.16
(i) any Senior Facility Base Interest Amount $3,668,703.94 $8,799,771.22
(ii) any Senior Murabaha Profit - $8,799,771.22
(iii) any Senior Facility Fees, Break Costs or other amount $471,458.33 $8,328,312.89
(vi) sixth, to credit the Senior USD Reserve Account and the Senior SAR Reserve Account (following the SAR Accension Date) up to the Required Amounts. $1,816,914.94 $6,511,397.95
(vii) seventh, in the event that a Senior Facility Advance Rate Test breach exists, to pay the Senior Facility Breach Repayment Amount in the following Sequence - $6,511,397.95
(A) to prepay the Senior Facility A Aggregate Funded Amount - $6,511,397.95
(B) If a Senior Facility Advance Rate Test Breach still exists, to prepay the Senior Facility B and the Senior Facility D - $6,511,397.95
(C) If a Senior Facility Advance Rate Test Breach still exists, to prepay the Senior Facility C - $6,511,397.95
(viii) during the Amortisation Period, to pay pro rata and pari passu the principal of the relevant Senior Loans - $6,511,397.95
(ix)ninth, Reference Rate Swap Close Out Amount (Senior C Facility) - $6,511,397.95
(x)tenth, to pay pro rata and pari passu according to the respective amounts thereof: - $6,511,397.95
(i) any Mezzanine Murabaha Profit $992,129.97 $5,519,267.98
(ii) any Mezzanine Facility Fees, Break Costs or other amount $84,791.67 $5,434,476.31
(xi) eleventh, to credit the Mezzanine Reserve Account up to the Reserve Required Amount (Mezzanine); - $5,434,476.31
(xii) twelfth, in the event that an Aggregate Facility Advance Rate Test breach exists, to pay the Mezzanine Facility Advance Rate Test Breach Amount - $5,434,476.31
(xiii) thirteenth, during the Amortisation Period or the Repayment Date to pay the principal amount of the Mezzanine Loans - $5,434,476.31
(xiv) fourteenth, to pay any Hedge Subordinated Amounts - $5,434,476.31
(xv) fifteenth, to pay any amount due to the Junior Lender (if any) - $5,434,476.31
(xvi) lastly, to repay any remaining amounts to the Originator as a surplus under the Murabaha Agreement. $5,434,476.31 -
Total Distribution Amount $12,861,744.99

data_notes: Dilution = refunds/cancellations as % of eligible originated
Write-off occurs at DPD 90. Recovery efforts continue post write-off.
BNPL product types: Pi2 (Pay in 2), Pi3, Pi4, Pi6
BNPL+ product types: Pi4, Pi6, Pi9, Pi12, Pi24 (Murabaha profit-bearing)
Pi6 exists in both BNPL and BNPL+ segments
Securitisation facility: Project Gasoline — KSA Securitisation
Eligible receivable criteria: resident, 18+, max balance, no 30-day-late in prior 12M, down payment paid
